_note: Cross-provider feed metadata. Thin: only carries facts that don't fit in a single per-provider file. Provider-specific per-feed_id details (canonical IDs, hashes) live in chaoslabs.mainnet.json / autonom.mainnet.json / switchboard.mainnet.json + .devnet.json. The `sessioned` map is the source of truth for whether a symbol needs market-hours management - MrAutonom uses it to filter the /hours/batch/adrena request to non-crypto feeds only.
